name: MCP Tool Latency
description: Measures end-to-end round-trip latency for representative holo_* MCP tool calls. Used to detect regressions in the HoloScript MCP server response times.
note: Each tool is called 3 times; latencyMs is the median. success:false is recorded when the target is unreachable or returns a non-2xx status (CI stubs may produce these; the perf gate is informational in that case).
